name: Alkhabeer Capital - Diversified Income ETF
summary: The Alkhabeer Capital - Diversified Income ETF aims to provide investors with Shariah-compliant income by investing in a diversified portfolio of income-generating assets. These assets can include sukuk, Murabaha, and other Shariah-compliant instruments, primarily within the GCC region. The ETF is managed by Alkhabeer Capital, headquartered in Saudi Arabia.
